visibleListings.title: Two-bedroom apartment with sea view on the first floor - Praia Cabral

The flat is on the 1st floor and comprises a comfortable living room with open-plan kitchen, 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, a storage room and also has a small pantry on the ground floor, offering functionality and additional storage space.
Its privileged location allows you to enjoy a pleasant sea view, just a few steps from the beach and close to the centre of Sal Rei, where you can find restaurants, cafés, supermarkets and other essential services.
This property is an excellent option both as a permanent residence and as a holiday home or investment in tourist rentals, benefiting from the tranquillity of the area and its proximity to the sea.
For more information or to arrange a viewing, please contact us. Viewings are also available on Saturdays by appointment.

Ideal for your own home, holiday home or investment, this flat combines comfort, versatility and an attractive location.

visibleListings.title: Melia Tortuga 2 Bed Penthouse for Sale
visibleListings.description: If you’re looking for a key-ready top floor apartment in Melia Tortuga in a quiet environment, look no further. This hotel-standard penthouse, with 2 bedrooms and a 15 square metre balcony, is fully furnished, and ready to move into. It includes everything down to the bed linen and cutlery, WiFi, LG TV and aircon. Located in a quiet and peaceful south side position, the apartment faces north and west, offering a choice of sunshine and shade all afternoon, and wonderful sunset views. The eagle eyed will even spot a slight sea view, between the palm trees. Sold freehold and fully furnished, this 2-bedroom and 2-bathroom penthouse has an enviable location within easy walking distance of the two pool areas, and of course the beautiful Algodoeiro beach: also known as Bikini Beach – beyond. Set in the tropical gardens of the 5* resort of Melia Tortuga – one of the most sought-after locations on Sal – this apartment has the restaurants, bars, spa and gym within a few minutes’ level walk. Those who want to enjoy the beach or pools, all the attractions, but then get a good night’s sleep will truly appreciate this. The well-planned accommodation includes, from the entrance: Though there are five restaurants in the resort and many more on the beach and in the other Melia hotels, this penthouse is well set up for self caterers. The fully-equipped kitchen includes a 4-ring hob, conventional and microwave oven, washing machine, fridge with small freezer and ample cupboard space. Everything down to towels and teaspoons is included in the price. The apartment is currently in the hotel rental scheme and so is kept in excellent condition. As the Freehold owner, you are entitled to use the apartment for five weeks of the year. For the rest of the year, it is used as a hotel suite. The hotel takes care of everything from the marketing to guest welcome, cleaning, laundry and even electricity and water bills. You are entitled to receive a of the income, and the management have recently been offering either a fixed income or a profit . Given sufficient notice, you could take the apartment out of the scheme, to use it whenever you like: as a holiday home, winter or year-round residence, or you could rent it out privately to long-term tenants or short term to family and friends. Here, on the west coast of Sal, with the famous white sands and clear turquoise warm waters of Algodoeiro Beach, Melia Tortuga is a low-rise, laid development set amidst lush, mature tropical gardens. There are miles of white sand beaches right on your doorstep, as well as safe swimming and snorkeling almost all year round in the warm waters of Bikini Beach.

visibleListings.title: Spacious 1 Bed Apartment with Sea Views for Sale: Melia Dunas
visibleListings.description: This is a wonderful first floor apartment in Block 5 of the Melia Dunas Hotel & Spa Resort, available for a very competitive price for a quick sale. Immaculately presented, this one-bed property is easily big enough for a family or group of friends, with over 54 square metres, including a long balcony – south facing – which gives incredible views of both sides of the island AND one of the pools. It enjoys all-day sunshine. Sold Freehold, fully furnished and guest ready, the well-planned accommodation includes: Superbly decorated and furnished, with air conditioning, this is ready for a new owner and will make an ideal base for your holidays on Sal. It is currently in the hotel rental scheme giving the new owner a passive of the income for 47 weeks of the year, with free holiday accommodation in one of the most popular resorts on Sal for five weeks each year. Given sufficient notice, it can be taken out of the scheme and used whenever you like, for yourselves, friends and family, or for long-term lets. It could represent a great retirement plan for forward thinkers. Melia Dunas has something for everyone and is a very popular holiday destination, including:

visibleListings.title: Amazing Boulevard Studio for Sale: Melia Dunas
visibleListings.description: If you’re looking for a fantastic holiday home on Sal for a bargain price, look no further than this lovely studio on the Boulevard in Melia Dunas. Here, you are the closest you can be to the beach, main pools, reception, spa and restaurants, the bars and shops. There are no apartments closer to the beach than the Boulevard, in this popular west coast hotel resort. NOT in a hotel rental scheme, this apartment is there for you, family and friends to use at any time of the year, for as long as you wish, and is also suitable for long-term rentals. It’s an ideal place in the sun, 155 metres from the golden sands! Immaculately presented, this spacious studio is as big as some 1 bed apartments, and the balcony – west facing – is the perfect place for watching the sun setting over the sea, and the world going by. Bathed in afternoon sunshine, it enjoys a fabulous ocean view – something apartments in other areas of Dunas simply don’t have. Sold fully furnished and key ready, the well-planned accommodation includes: Superbly decorated and furnished, this is ready to move into and will make an ideal basis for your holidays on Sal. Melia Dunas has something for everyone and is a very popular holiday destination, including:

visibleListings.title: 1-Bed Penthouse Apartment for Sale, Atriplex, Vila Verde
visibleListings.description: One-bedroom apartments for sale in Vila Verde are incredibly rare, and almost none are as beautifully decorated and maintained as this penthouse in Atriplex. Built to arguably the highest standards on the island, this penthouse is truly key ready. Every detail has been thought of and every item of maintenance taken care of. c.78 square metres of space gives a very spacious, airy and light environment with a very sunny balcony overlooking the gorgeous pool and gardens of Atriplex. Atriplex is a very popular community in Vila Verde. Well maintained and occupied, it has working elevators, beautiful gardens, a children’s playground and pool as well as the main pool, refurbished in the last year. Nestled in the centre of Vila Verde, it is easily walkable to everything, including two bars, 3 restaurants, the well-stocked supermarket, free shuttle bus stop, the coffee shop and gelateria. With over 77 square metres, a fully-equipped kitchen, large living room with sofabed, separate bedroom and separate bathroom, there is ample space here for a family or couple, or for permanent living. This penthouse is sold fully furnished and ready to move into, or let out. The sale includes: Please note that the air conditioning is not currently functioning, but a freestanding unit provides superb cooling for the hottest summer months. For the rest of the year, with a gorgeous breeze, the apartment is airy and cool. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to being based in the town or resorts. It is ideal for those seeking western standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators in all blocks, regular shuttle buses, one of the best supermarkets on Sal and easy walking or free shuttle distance to two beaches. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde’s architecture is unique and extremely appealing for winter living, holidays and holiday rentals, or as a permanent home.

visibleListings.title: Central Santa Maria 1 Bed Penthouse for Sale
visibleListings.description: This fabulous one-bedroom penthouse is in the very centre of the thriving tourist capital of Sal, Santa Maria. With views of the east and west coastlines, it overlooks the walkway between the main market and clothes market, so is the perfect place to watch the world go by. It is just 300 metres from Santa Maria’s wonderful beach, and 180 metres from the market. Offering over 70 square metres of versatile space, this Italian designed apartment is in a very well-maintained and managed building that is both clean and secure. It has had a complete redecoration, taking care of any repairs, in the last 12 months. From the road, you would never guess that such a fabulous penthouse was above you. The apartment and its covered balcony is unoverlooked, quiet, private and with good neighbours. The full-furnished accommodation includes: With such a large foot , the internal accommodation could easily be changed to add a larger mezzanine, shelving, and possibly a second bedroom. Giving the correct Alojamento Complimentar licence, this could make an ideal short-term rental unit for tourists, but has sufficient space for year-round living. Central Santa Maria is THE investment hot spot of Cabo Verde. With the highest number of visitors for tourism amongst the islands, it is the holiday heart of the islands with hundreds of restaurants, bars, hotels, shops and the famous fishing pier, currently being reconstructed and expanded. With its glorious safe swimming beach and watersports galore and a central pedestrianised street at its heart, Santa Maria on Sal provides excellent investment potential and a thriving, lively place to live. *IUP: cca 100 Euros a year

visibleListings.title: NEW 1 Bed-Apartment with Wrap-Around Balcony  – Santa Maria
visibleListings.description: Finished in 2022, the Ocean Roof building is amongst the best construction of all new builds in Santa Maria, and Casa Verde are proud to release the first phase of apartments available Freehold, fully furnished and key ready. Built, fitted and furnished to the best European standards, these stylish apartments are perfect for holiday lets, long-term rentals or winter living on Sal. They are sold fully furnished. Less than a minutes’ walk to the beach at Angulos and 5 minutes to the heart of Santa Maria, the location is ideal: next to condominiums that have much higher sales prices. This is one of the most desirable and central locations in Santa Maria, with safe swimming in azure waters, and pure sands, just steps away. The great advantage here is that, unlike off-plan buildings, Ocean Roof is completed and proven. There is no waiting to see how it will turn out, no anxiety over staged payments and missed building deadlines: this is a finished build and ready to move into. With rentals now outlawed by the developers in many of the west coast resorts, apartments in Santa Maria offer a safe haven for investors. Rentals are definitely permitted here, indeed this apartment has a proven history of holiday rentals, with average nightly rate of 100 Euros. The new owner will need to apply for their own Alojamento Complimentar (AC) licence, which Casa Verde can assist with. This light, airy apartment, named Sao Vicente after one of the developer’s islands, consists of: Everything down to lamps, towels and teaspoons is included in the price. This apartment is available to purchase singly, or as part of a suite. There are four in total to be sold on the 1st floor of this fabulous building: price for the floor on application.

visibleListings.title: Prime Opportunity: 2 Bed NEW Apartments, Central Santa Maria
visibleListings.description: A rare opportunity to secure a newly built apartment in a well-constructed three storey building located on the Pharmacy Street in the very heart of Santa Maria, Sal. These superb two-bedroom apartments are in the final phase of fitting and decorating, with the construction due to be complete by the end of February 2026. With only three apartments remaining for sale, this is a chance to acquire a luxury new-build property in an unrivalled central location. Facing away from the traffic and overlooking a quiet and quaint street, the apartments enjoy peace and quiet, whilst being right in the vibrant heart of Santa Maria. Just 160 metres from Santa Maria’s golden beach and the pier, this is one of the best available locations in Sal’s tourist heart, perfect for holiday lets or to be a winter, holiday or permanent home. Crucially for investors, there are NO restrictions on private rentals, allowing you to list this property on platforms such as Airbnb and Booking.com, provided the appropriate local licence (AC) is secured. Built by trusted developers, this wow-factor apartment comes with a high-quality finish and includes: You need only choose your preferred furniture and appliances to complete this luxurious space and decorate to your taste. Casa Verde is here to help with this. Condo fees are forecast to be circa 50 Euros a month, making this an economical choice for central living in a clean, secure, smart and well-maintained building. Completion is anticipated by the end of February 2026, with a potential move-in date as early as March. Don’t miss this chance to acquire a new build, prime property in Santa Maria without a price tag of 500,000+ Euros.

visibleListings.title: Rare Melia Tortuga apartment: 2 beds, 2 balconies
visibleListings.description: This is a very rare opportunity to acquire a large, accessible two-bedroom apartment within the Melia Tortuga hotel building itself. This of course makes it close to all the hotel amenities, including two bars, the spa, restaurant, gym and more. This ground floor accommodation boasts two balconies, one facing east for the morning sun and sunrise views; the other facing west for afternoon sun and a great view of the sunset. This also means the owners can enjoy a lovely breeze throughout, as the prevailing winds are from the north east. Aircon is also available in the open plan living area and master bedroom. With a well-equipped kitchen and breakfast bar, this apartment is great for self-catering holidaymakers and is sold fully furnished and ready for you, family and friends to use. It would also make a superb and private winter retreat, with all the amenities of this 5* hotel and spa resort close to hand. The spa, 2 bars, gym and restaurant, as well as reception, are under a minute’s walk away. The two pool complexes, more bars and restaurants – and of course the renowned beach – are an easy, level stroll. While being so close to all the facilities, this is a very quiet and peaceful apartment which would suit a family or couple looking for a good amount of living space. Melia Tortuga, a 5* beach resort hotel and spa, is set in lovely tropical gardens, sloping gently to the white sands and safe year-round swimming of the west coast Bikini Beach. With a leisurely, relaxed pace of life, it is a very popular resort that never feels overcrowded or pressurised. *condo fees 297 Euros a month if out of rental scheme

visibleListings.title: Vila Verde 1-Bed Apartment for Sale: Cactus
visibleListings.description: One-bedroom apartments for sale in Vila Verde are incredibly rare, and in Cactus even more so. This is the premier community in Vila Verde, with a vibrant mix of tourists and residents, centred on a gorgeous pool, with poolside restaurant and bar. This 2nd floor apartment is highly sought after, so early viewings are recommended. Here in Cactus, sitting on your prominent balcony, you can enjoy the sunshine from dawn onwards, with views not only of the pool, but of Kite Beach and Serra Negra. Immediately below you are the adult and children’s pools, the tropical gardens, a good range of sunbeds, plus a poolside restaurant and bar. For holidays, as your winter home, as a holiday rental or a long-term residence, this is an idyllic setting with one of the best views available on Sal. You are only 5 minutes by free shuttle bus from the bustling tourist heart of the island in Santa Maria, or from the beach at Ponta Preta where your free sunbeds on the beach are waiting. Built to arguably the highest standards on the island, this apartment is ready for a new owner to personalise to their taste. The walls are a blank white canvas, but all the furniture, even the crockery and bed linen, is included in the price. The current owner has only ever used this as a winter home, so there is almost no damage or guest wear and tear. With approximately 70 square metres, a fully-equipped kitchen, clearly defined living area with sofabed, separate bedroom and separate bathroom, there is ample space here for a family or couple, or for permanent living. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to being based in the town or resorts. It is ideal for those seeking western standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators in all blocks, regular shuttle buses, one of the best supermarkets on Sal and easy walking or free shuttle distance to two beaches. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde’s architecture is unique and extremely appealing for winter living, holidays and holiday rentals, or as a permanent home.

visibleListings.title: Ground Floor 2 Bed KEY READY Apartment: Coprosma, Vila Verde
visibleListings.description: Accessible, with European furniture, this is a lovely, large 2-bedroom ground floor apartment in the peaceful Coprosma community of Vila Verde. There is ample outside space with views of the gardens and pool, enjoying a choice of sunshine and much-needed shade beneath tropical trees. The apartment is one of the closest to the beaches of Algodoeiro (Bikini Beach) and Ponta Preta, with a west-facing terrace off both bedrooms giving a great view of the sunset. You have the choice of views, sunshine or shade, all day. Properties in Coprosma do not come onto the open market often. This is a happy community with a mixture of residents and tourists, those who overwinter to enjoy the warm, year-round sun and those who live here full time. Those looking for an investment opportunity can rent out this property with the appropriate AC licence. Coprosma is not just close to the beaches, it has its own working pool, and is only a minute’s walk from the free shuttle bus stop, and <5 minutes from Vila Verde supermarket. Step free, it is particularly suitable for families or more mature couples, and anyone with accessibility needs. Coprosma is a great place to home. It is NOT for those who want all-night parties and aqua aerobics by the pool, though both are available in the nearby west coast resorts. The accommodation, offering c.133m²of indoor-outdoor living, comprises: Though there is air-conditioning throughout, the apartment is very airy with a great through breeze once the patio doors and bedroom windows are open. With fly screens included, you can enjoy the cool without worrying about insects. Vila Verde offers a luxury, peaceful alternative to town or beach-front hotel resorts. It is ideal for those seeking European standards of accommodation, 24-hour security, elevators in all blocks, regular shuttle buses, a great supermarket and a short walk/free shuttle to the beach. With wide boulevards and beautiful gardens, Vila Verde is fully completed and aspirational for many. In Vila Verde, owners are free to do as they wish with their property, so this could be a retreat from the winter, a holiday rental, long-term let or permanent residence.

visibleListings.title: Beachfront 3 bed: Praia Antonio Sousa
visibleListings.description: The word “unique” is bandied around too much, but this 3-bedroom ground-floor apartment truly is. Larger than some villas, it enjoys an amazing beachside location and 180°ocean views. The internal accommodation is very well planned, with vast amounts of storage, but what truly sets this completely accessible home apart is the outside space. Here, you could have a fourth bedroom, a fifth bedroom, a garage, a shop, a workshop … there is almost as much outside space as there is internally, the versatile space wraps around three sides of the apartment. From this superb and secure space, you can step out onto the sand, watch the ocean, the boats and surfers, and as you’re facing west, enjoy Santa Maria’s sunsets. The apartment is in an idyllic spot, yet is under 2 minutes’ walk to a safe swimming beach and 10 minutes’ level walk to the heart of the town, with all the restaurants, bars and shops. Praia Antonio Sousa itself is a highly sought-after developing location, towards the southern tip of Sal, and with Serena Bay being built less than 500 metres away. There are new restaurants, surf schools and convenience stores popping up all the time. While the surroundings change, this apartment on what is known as Millionaire’s Row will always enjoy its location so close to the beautiful azure sea and the beach. The tastefully decorated and well-maintained accommodation comprises: The scope of this apartment must be seen.

visibleListings.title: Detached Corner Plot 3 Bedroom Villa: Melia Tortuga
visibleListings.description: If you’re looking for a wow-factor villa with glorious sunset and sea views, if you want to watch the ocean waves from your bedroom in private, spacious and luxury surrounds, this could be the place for you. Occupying a fantastic corner plot position, this is one of the best-placed villas on the west coast of Sal. It has a wrap-around garden at the end of a private cul de sac, so is free from onlookers. On the second row from a stunning sand beach, its upper floor looks over the top of the bungalows on the front line, giving a wonderful 180 degree view of the beach and ocean. The rear garden is laid to lawn and has a private pool, enjoying the morning sunshine. With a balcony running the length of the top floor facing the sea, and another facing east, you have the choice of sunshine and shade all day long. Three bedrooms and three bathrooms with open plan dining, living and kitchen areas, this detached villa is designed for indoor-outdoor living. Large patio doors and windows give a wonderful through breeze, though there is of course air con as well. There is ample storage, the villa comes fully furnished and there is a downstairs bedroom and bathroom for those with accessibility needs. This villa is NOT in any sort of rental scheme. visibleListings.title: Stunning penthouse next to the beach
visibleListings.description: This modern penthouse for sale in Santa Maria, Sal Island, Cape Verde is located on the third floor of a recently built condominium named Atlantic Sal, just a short walk from both the beach and the city center. The property features a bright and spacious living room with equipped kitchen and direct access to a well sized veranda, two bedrooms with large windows that allow abundant natural light, creating a welcoming and airy atmosphere. One bedroom has a direct sea view, where every sunrise transforms the space into an inspiring environment. Both bedrooms are equipped with wardrobes and modern finishes; both have access to the terrace, which expands the area for leisure and socializing. The property has two bathrooms, one of which is private to the main bedroom, ensuring comfort and privacy. An internal stair leads you to the top floor terrace from which you can enjoy breathtaking ocean views. Considering its huge size, it has a lot of potential. It’s perfect for enjoying the climate, admiring the sea, and savoring tranquil moments or outdoor meals. With architecture designed for well-being, this apartment combines practicality, comfort and a privileged location, making it an excellent retreat for those seeking to live close to nature, the sea and the city center. It has air conditioning in the living area and in both bedrooms and on the windows there are automated blackout blinds. The apartment is for sale furnished with a modern touch, ready to move in or rent out immediately. Purchasing this apartment gives you access to a range of excellent facilities, including: The condominium is ideal for tourist rentals, thanks to its prime location within walking distance of Santa Maria city center and the beach. Nearby, you will find shops, restaurants, mini-markets, surf/kite/dive schools, bike rentals, beach bars. This property is an excellent opportunity for anyone looking for a holiday home in Cape Verde or a secure real estate investment in Sal Island. to make your dreams come true!

visibleListings.title: SPACIOUS 1 BEDROOM APARTMENT IN LEME BEDJE RESIDENCE
visibleListings.description: Spacious 1 bedroom apartment, inside the Leme Bedje, a beachfront residence, in Santa Maria. Discover this charming one-bedroom apartment for sale in Santa Maria, Ilha do Sal, Cape Verde, located in the highly sought-after Leme Bedje Residence, directly opposite one of the island’s most popular beaches. Situated on the second floor, the property is thoughtfully furnished and maintained in good condition. It features one cozy bedroom, one bathroom, and a large open-plan kitchen connected to the living room. The bright and airy interior opens onto a large balcony, making it the perfect place to relax. 24/7 security service; Storage area for surfboards at the entrance; d swimming pool with solarium and sun loungers; Tropical gardens creating a relaxing environment; On-site rental agency for tourist management. Just cross the road to reach the beach, or enjoy the many nearby amenities such as bars, restaurants, ice cream shop, kite/surf/dive/windsurf schools, bicycle rentals and mini markets. The lively city center of Santa Maria is only a 5-minute walk away.

visibleListings.title: LARGE 2 BEDROOMS APARTMENT IN VILA VERDE COMPLEX
visibleListings.description: Discover this beautiful two-bedroom apartment for sale in Santa Maria, Sal Island, Cape Verde, located inside the prestigious Vila Verde Resort, a 4-star tourist complex near the stunning Ponta Preta beach. Situated on the ground floor, the property offers an entrance hall, a guest bathroom adapted for people with mobility difficulties, a spacious kitchenette and bright living room with direct access to a terrace overlooking the tropical garden. The master bedroom includes an ensuite bathroom and private terrace, while the second bedroom has access to a separate balcony. Tastefully furnished and thoughtfully laid out, it provides a bright and welcoming atmosphere, combining contemporary design with practical functionality. All windows and French doors are equipped with mosquito screens, ensuring fresh air and comfort at any time without inconvenience. Ideal for guests seeking an accessible, comfortable, and modern stay. The apartment is for sale fully furnished and in excellent condition. The Vila Verde Resort in Sal Cape Verde provides everything you need for comfort and relaxation: 24/7 security, elevators, parking, swimming pools, children’s play areas, and wide landscaped spaces with tropical gardens. Nearby you will also find a reception, ATM, restaurant with bar, bike rental, and a well-stocked mini market. Just a few minutes’ walk takes you to the golden sands of Ponta Preta Beach, famous for its natural beauty and oceanfront restaurant and bar. The vibrant centre of Santa Maria is only a 20-minute walk or a short taxi ride away, with a free shuttle service available several times a day from the resort. This property is a perfect opportunity for anyone looking for a holiday home in Cape Verde, a real estate investment in Sal, or an apartment close to Santa Maria.

visibleListings.title: Charming Top-Floor Apartment with High Ceilings in Quiet Central Area
visibleListings.description: For sale, top-floor apartment located in a quiet yet well-connected residential area, close to supermarkets and everyday services. The property features a spacious living area with open-plan kitchen, one bedroom, bathroom, small mezzanine, and a previously enclosed balcony. One of the main highlights of the apartment is the high ceilings with exposed wooden roof, which give the space character, warmth, and a pleasant sense of openness. The location is fairly central, offering convenience while maintaining a peaceful living environment. The apartment is situated on the third floor with stair access only (no elevator) and is furnished in a basic, functional style. Please note that the enclosed balcony requires attention: the roofing and window installations were added later and water ingress can occur during heavy rain, making renovation advisable. An interesting opportunity for buyers looking for a top-floor home with distinctive features, to be upgraded and personalized.

visibleListings.title: Penthouse for Sale in Santa Maria – Spacious Modern Apartment with Terrace, Sal Island Cape Verde
